description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall, dense hedge and a white perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The structure features a flat roof and a minimalist design with clean lines, large windows, and a mix of white and natural wood finishes. The front entrance is marked by a black gate and a pathway leading to the main door, while the backyard includes a swimming pool bordered by palm trees and a patio area. The layout is open, with multiple rooms visible through expansive glass panels, and the landscaping includes both manicured hedges and ornamental trees. The property is designed for both comfort and aesthetics, with outdoor living spaces integrated into the overall plan. The architectural style emphasizes openness, light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a white perimeter wall surrounded by tall hedges and palm trees. Features include a swimming pool, patio, and open-plan layout with natural wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, black gate, and a clear view of the open-plan layout with tall hedges and palm trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense hedge, white wall, and the pool area with palm trees visible behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and large glass windows facing the backyard, with palm trees and hedges enclosing the space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the hedge, a secondary entrance or service area, and additional landscaping with ornamental trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass panels
